title: Nutritional Foundation
subtitle: Preparing for the next phase
description: As you complete the first trimester, your appetite may feel more stable and manageable. This is a good time to strengthen your nutrition habits and build a solid foundation for the coming weeks.
what_to_expect: More stable appetite and food tolerance
Better ability to follow consistent meal patterns
nutrition_focus: Reinforce a balanced and structured diet
Include a variety of nutrients in daily meals
recommended_foods: Balanced meals like dal, roti, rice, sabzi, and salad
Fruits like banana, apple, papaya, orange, and guava
Vegetables including spinach, beans, carrots, and लौकी
Protein sources like curd, paneer, lentils, eggs, or chicken (if preferred)
hydration: Drink water regularly throughout the day
Include fluids like buttermilk, coconut water, or lemon water
reassurance: A strong and balanced diet now helps prepare your body for the next stage.

diabetes.personalized_description: A consistent and balanced diet supports stable energy and blood sugar levels.
nutrition_focus: Balance carbohydrates with protein and fiber
recommended_foods: Whole grains like oats and brown rice
Protein-rich foods like lentils and paneer
diabetes.reassurance: Balanced routines help maintain stability and comfort.

anemia.personalized_description: Consistent intake of iron-rich foods supports building strength for the coming weeks.
nutrition_focus: Pair meals with vitamin C sources
foods_to_limit: Tea or coffee immediately after meals
anemia.reassurance: Steady nourishment helps build your energy over time.

hypertension.personalized_description: A structured and balanced diet supports stable blood pressure levels.
nutrition_focus: Keep meals balanced and moderate in salt
hypertension.reassurance: Consistent meals support a calm and balanced routine.

thyroid.personalized_description: A steady and balanced diet supports overall metabolic stability.
thyroid.reassurance: Consistency and balance support your body's needs.

multi_condition_blend.combined_message: When managing multiple conditions, reinforcing balanced and consistent eating habits becomes especially important at this stage.
priority_nutrition: Avoid skipping meals or irregular eating
multi_condition_blend.reassurance: A strong nutritional foundation supports your well-being in the weeks ahead.
